title: BEC faculty content
description: Faculty directory keyed by department URL slug. Each entry is a minimal record: identity + a link to the full profile/CV PDF on R2. src/content/faculty.ts resolves the photo and cv asset keys to public URLs. Only `name` and `designation` are required.

photo.description: Portrait asset key on R2 (autocompletes). Omit until a photo is uploaded; the card falls back to initials.

cv.description: Full profile / CV PDF asset key on R2 (autocompletes). Omit if no profile PDF is available; the card then has no modal.

departments.description: Map of department URL slug -> faculty[].
